client.address: 200 Park Avenue, Suite 1400, New York, NY 10166

milestones.deliverable: Discovery & Assessment Report: inventory of on-prem workloads, dependency map, target AWS architecture diagram, risk register
Landing Zone & Networking Setup: AWS Organisations, VPCs, Transit Gateway, IAM baseline, Control Tower guardrails

Migration Wave 1 (covers two sub-deliverables, see below): (a) Data warehouse migration to Amazon Redshift, including schema conversion and historical data backfill; (b) Migration of three (3) tier-1 analytical workloads to Amazon EMR with cutover runbook
Managed Services Handover: runbooks, SOPs, on-call rotation setup, CloudWatch dashboards, monthly reporting cadence established
Final Acceptance: 30-day stabilisation period complete, all open Severity-1 and Severity-2 issues resolved or waived in writing
